raw.subject: Your Oakland page caught my eye
raw.body:
Hi,

I noticed that your recent post offering lowest prices in Oakland and close surrounding area for waterslide bounce house combos has really taken off! You're getting a lot of love from customers who appreciate your professional service.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might mean some potential customers are missing out on getting quotes from you directly.

On a whim I pulled together a quick page concept from what you already post on Facebook. It includes a services overview, photo gallery, contact section, and map with hours.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/bounce-n-splash-rentals-llc-oakland

I'd love to discuss how we can turn this into a fully functional site that helps you grow your business. Let's talk about a straightforward project with a flat fee for local businesses. Would you be open to discussing this further by phone or email?
